news.t: Best High-Yield Bond ETFs for Q1 2021

overview.description: The Pacer Trendpilot US Bond ETF (PTBD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pacer Trendpilot US Bond index. The fund tracks an index that uses a momentum-driven proprietary strategy that toggles between U.S. High Yield Corporate Bonds and 7-10 Year Treasury Bonds. PTBD was launched on Oct 22, 2019 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Best High-Yield Bond ETFs for Q1 2021
data.text: The best high-yield bond ETFs for Q1 2021 are FALN, ANGL, and PTBD.
